Bash(cd "C:/Apps/JLPT_Progress_N1" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from server import load_all_data
stats, rows = load_all_data\(\)
s = stats['summary']
print\(f'Total: {s[\\"total\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Known: {s[\\"known\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Ignored: {s[\\"ignored\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Known+Ignored: {s[\\"known\\"] + s[\\"ignored\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Learning: {s[\\"learning\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Unknown: {s[\\"unknown\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Tracked: {s[\\"tracked\\"]}'\)
print\(f'Sum check: {s[\\"known\\"] + s[\\"ignored\\"] + s[\\"learning\\"] + s[\\"unknown\\"]} == {s[\\"total\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
for mode in ['cumulative', 'perLevel']:
    print\(f'--- {mode} ---'\)
    for level in ['N5','N4','N3','N2','N1']:
        d = stats[mode][level]
        print\(f'  {level}: total={d[\\"total\\"]} known={d[\\"known\\"]} ign={d[\\"ignored\\"]} learn={d[\\"learning\\"]} unk={d[\\"unknown\\"]}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:/Apps/JLPT_Progress_N1" && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
req = Request\('https://api.jsonbin.io/v3/b/6938e9b8ae596e708f8f3b5b'\)
resp = urlopen\(req\)
print\('Status:', resp.status\)
import json
data = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
print\('Keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
record = data.get\('record', data\)
print\('Record type:', type\(record\).__name__\)
if isinstance\(record, dict\):
    print\('Record keys:', list\(record.keys\(\)\)\)
    for k in record:
        v = record[k]
        print\(f'  {k}: {type\(v\).__name__}, len={len\(v\) if isinstance\(v,list\) else \\"n/a\\"}'\)
elif isinstance\(record, list\):
    print\('Record len:', len\(record\), 'first 3:', record[:3]\)
")
